scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../projects-service && npm install && cd ../ai-review-service && npm install && cd ../../frontends/shell && npm install && cd ../projects-app && npm install && cd ../ai-review-app && npm install
scripts.start:services: concurrently -n auth,projects,airev,gateway -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "cd services/auth-service && npm start" "cd services/projects-service && npm start" "cd services/ai-review-service && npm start" "wait-on tcp:4001 tcp:4002 tcp:4003 && cd services/gateway && npm start"
scripts.start:frontends: concurrently -n projects,airev,shell -c magenta,yellow,green "cd frontends/projects-app && npm run dev" "cd frontends/ai-review-app && npm run dev" "cd frontends/shell && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n back,front -c blue,cyan "npm run start:services" "npm run start:frontends"
